title: skel's spear pencils
description: Minecraft, but the spears are now comically large pencils.
body:
# ever thought the Minecraft spears were too boring?
well, look no further! introducing, the spear pencils!


![chaos pencils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0d66997c393651a55699e28c61033aae59de88.png)

they're stupid. they're big. they're stupidly big. and if you're anything like me, you would LOVE this pack.

honestly i made this in like 45 minutes, this was a dumb idea that i wanted to bring to life. and it turned out okay at best :P
